prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高；本省2026年物理类考生估算约32.9 万人，较2025年28.5万人增加约15.5%，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年计划仅小幅扩招（+1.6%）及本 省物理类考生大幅增加（+15.5%），竞争压力上升是主导因素；声誉偏负面有轻微抑制作用但不足以抵消考生规模扩张的影响。预测最低位次约16891名，区间16391–17391名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 16905 → 14539 → 14164 → 16680. After consecutive advances in 2023–2024, there was a significant backward shift of about 2500 places in 2025, with considerable fluctuations over the past 4 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 16680. The provincial science enrollment plan was 165 in 2022 → 183 in 2023 → 177 in 2024 → 186 in 2025 → 189 in 2026, with a slight expansion of 3 students (+1.6%) in 2026 compared to 2025, which has limited impact on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university. Ranked 54th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable range of 48–55 in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents. Douyin popularity ranks 98th overall (average), with medium-low short video exposure, showing no significant increase in application attention. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Transportation Engineering (A-), and Mechanical Engineering (A-) are all core engineering disciplines, strongly attractive to physics category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation continue to have high social demand. In 2026, the estimated number of physics category candidates in the province is about 329,000, an increase of approximately 15.5% from 285,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 plans (+1.6%), and the substantial increase in provincial physics category candidates (+15.5%), rising competitive pressure is the dominant factor. The negative reputation has a slight inhibitory effect but is insufficient to offset the impact of candidate scale expansion. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16891, with a range of 16391–17391.
